final:
module qam_modulator (
    input [3:0] symbol,
    output reg [3:0] obf_I,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    always @(symbol) begin
        case (symbol)
            4'b0000: begin obf_I = 4'b0000; Q = 4'b0000; end
            4'b0001: begin obf_I = 4'b0000; Q = 4'b0001; end
            4'b0010: begin obf_I = 4'b0001; Q = 4'b0000; end
            4'b0011: begin obf_I = 4'b0001; Q = 4'b0001; end
            4'b0100: begin obf_I = 4'b0000; Q = 4'b0010; end
            4'b0101: begin obf_I = 4'b0001; Q = 4'b0010; end
            4'b0110: begin obf_I = 4'b0010; Q = 4'b0000; end
            4'b0111: begin obf_I = 4'b0010; Q = 4'b0001; end
            4'b1000: begin obf_I = 4'b0010; Q = 4'b0010; end
            4'b1001: begin obf_I = 4'b0011; Q = 4'b0000; end
            4'b1010: begin obf_I = 4'b0011; Q = 4'b0001; end
            4'b1011: begin obf_I = 4'b0011; Q = 4'b0010; end
            4'b1100: begin obf_I = 4'b0000; Q = 4'b0011; end
            4'b1101: begin obf_I = 4'b0001; Q = 4'b0011; end
            4'b1110: begin obf_I = 4'b0010; Q = 4'b0011; end
            4'b1111: begin obf_I = 4'b0011; Q = 4'b0011; end
            default: begin obf_I = 4'b0000; Q = 4'b0000; end
        endcase
    end
endmodule
